programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Christmas for Miranda is a painful reminder of the family she never had.

programme.title: Jailbreak Lovers
programme.desc: When Toby loses her job and starts a nonprofit to rehabilitate abused, rescued dogs at the local prison, she hatches a plan to break her lover out of prison by smuggling him out in one of the dog crates, sparking a federal manhunt.

programme.title: Cocaine Godmother: The Griselda Blanco Story
programme.desc: Griselda Blanco becomes a pioneer in the Miami-based cocaine trade. Her willingness to use violence against her rivals leads to numerous assassination attempts, forcing Griselda to move her business to California.

programme.title: Gwen Shamblin: Starving for Salvation
programme.desc: Gwen Shamblin founds a Christian-based diet program, preaching the power of prayer for weight loss, accumulating power and money as a larger-than-life public persona with dramatically teased hair. Her reign comes to a tragic end in May 2021, when the plane her husband Joe is flying crashes, killing Gwen, Joe, their son-in-law and four other church leaders.

programme.title: Jailbreak Lovers
programme.desc: When Toby loses her job and starts a nonprofit to rehabilitate abused, rescued dogs at the local prison, she hatches a plan to break her lover out of prison by smuggling him out in one of the dog crates, sparking a federal manhunt.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his old partner, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich), are caught in the grip of retirement -- but that soon changes when a powerful Cold War weapon known as Nightshade resurfaces decades after its disappearance. With assassins hot on their trail, Frank and his team set out to find the one scientist (Anthony Hopkins) who can unravel the mystery of Nightshade and help them save themselves -- and the world.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: After serving 28 years in prison for accidentally killing the son of a crime boss, newly paroled gangster Val (Al Pacino) reunites with his former partners in crime, Doc (Christopher Walken) and Hirsch (Alan Arkin), for a night on the town. As the three men revisit old haunts, reflect on their glory days and try to make up for lost time, one wrestles with a terrible quandary: Doc has orders to kill Val, and time is running out for him to figure out a way out of his dilemma.

programme.title: Jackie Brown
programme.desc: When flight attendant Jackie Brown (Pam Grier) is busted smuggling money for her arms dealer boss, Ordell Robbie (Samuel L. Jackson), agent Ray Nicolette (Michael Keaton) and detective Mark Dargus (Michael Bowen) want her help to bring down Robbie. Facing jail time for her silence or death for her cooperation, Brown decides instead to double-cross both parties and make off with the smuggled money. Meanwhile, she enlists the help of bondsman Max Cherry (Robert Forster), a man who loves her.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: An ex-con (Clive Owen) tries to pull away from a life of crime, but the temptation proves too strong, bringing his already-strained relationship with his policeman brother (Billy Crudup) to the breaking point.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life
programme.desc: Lara Croft sets out on a quest to save Pandora's box from landing into the wrong hands. Join her as she races through furious hand-to-hand battles, blazing shoot-outs and breathtaking sky-diving escapes to try to save the ancient artifact.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: In this sequel set eleven years after "The Terminator," young John Connor (Edward Furlong), the key to civilization's victory over a future robot uprising, is the target of the shape-shifting T-1000 (Robert Patrick), a Terminator sent from the future to kill him. Another Terminator, the revamped T-800 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), has been sent back to protect the boy. As John and his mother (Linda Hamilton) go on the run with the T-800, the boy forms an unexpected bond with the robot.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys
programme.desc: When John Connor (Jason Clarke), leader of the human resistance against Skynet, sends Kyle Reese (Jai Courtney) back to 1984 to protect his mother, Sarah (Emilia Clarke), from a Terminator assassin, an unexpected turn of events creates an altered timeline. Instead of a scared waitress, Sarah is a skilled fighter and has a Terminator guardian (Arnold Schwarzenegger) by her side. Faced with unlikely allies and dangerous new enemies, Reese sets out on an unexpected new mission: reset the future.

programme.title: The Broken Hearts Club: A Romantic Comedy
programme.desc: A fresh, funny, real story about a group of gay men in Hollywood, their lovers and friends, and the often hilarious, occasionally poignant space in between -- that is if they can get any space at all. As they make their ways in the world with and without each other, they are suddenly faced with an unexpected tragedy. The group finds comfort the only way they ever have -- together.

programme.title: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Encouraged by his girlfriend (Charisma Carpenter), a man (Christopher Gorham) joins his two siblings for their father's (Terry Bradshaw) weeklong event of competitive games.

programme.title: Cops and Robbersons
programme.desc: Tough-guy police officer Jake Stone (Jack Palance) and his less seasoned partner, Tony Moore (David Barry Gray), are intent on taking down Osborn (Robert Davi), a ruthless criminal. However, since Osborn is holed up in the suburbs, Jake and Tony must hold their stakeout in a neighboring house, home to the Robbersons. The well-meaning family, including patriarch Norman (Chevy Chase), tries to assist the cops in their duties, but it proves to be unwanted help.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: When the Switchblade, the most sophisticated prototype stealth fighter created yet, is stolen from the U.S. government, one of the United States' top spies, Alex Scott (Owen Wilson), is called to action. What he doesn't expect is to get teamed up with a cocky civilian, World Class Boxing Champion Kelly Robinson (Eddie Murphy), on a dangerous top secret espionage mission. Their assignment: using equal parts skill and humor, catch Arnold Gundars, one of the world's most successful arms dealers.

programme.title: Passport to Suez
programme.desc: Master sleuth Lone Wolf (Warren William) outwits Nazi spies for canal plans in Egypt.

programme.title: Decameron Nights
programme.desc: In the 14th century, famous writer Giovanni Boccaccio (Louis Jourdan) returns to Florence, Italy, to woo beautiful noblewoman Fiametta (Joan Fontaine). Although Fiametta rejects Giovanni's attentions, he wins an audience by promising to tell her an original story. Relating a lively tale of a Spanish pirate, Giovanni then spins numerous other tales that Fiametta criticizes as mockery. After Giovanni challenges her to respond in kind, the pair flirts, trying to outdo each other in tall tales.

programme.title: Our Man in Havana
programme.desc: British expatriate Jim Wormold (Alec Guinness) runs a vacuum cleaner store in Havana, Cuba. He has promised his vain daughter, Milly (Jo Morrow), a horse and a country club membership, which leaves him desperate for money. When Hawthorne (Noel Coward) proposes he become a paid British agent and recruit other spies, he accepts, and haplessly embarks on a new career. Though he's delighted when he meets gorgeous fellow spy Beatrice Severn (Maureen O'Hara), Wormold finds he's now a target.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: When Joanna Drayton (Katharine Houghton), a free-thinking white woman, and black doctor John Prentice (Sidney Poitier) become engaged, they travel to San Francisco to meet her parents. Matt Drayton (Spencer Tracy) and his wife Christina (Katharine Hepburn) are wealthy liberals who must confront the latent racism the coming marriage arouses. Also attending the Draytons' dinner are Prentice's parents (Roy E. Glenn Sr., Beah Richards), who vehemently disapprove of the relationship.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: The Earth has stopped rotating because of a change in the planet's core temperature. To restore the normal temperature, astronauts must travel to the center and detonate a nuclear bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life on the surface.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: What happens when a person decides that life is merely a state of mind? If you're Betty, a small-town waitress and soap opera fan from Fair Oaks, Kansas, you refuse to believe that you can't be with the love of your life just because he doesn't really exist. After all, life is no excuse for not living. Traumatized by a savage event, Betty enters into a fugue state that allows -- even encourages -- her to keep functioning... in a kind of alternate reality.

programme.title: Christmas at the Riviera
programme.desc: An assistant manager tries to run a hotel at Christmastime.

programme.title: A Christmas Number One
programme.desc: Two worlds collide when a music manager of a boy band and the guitarist in a death metal group connect over a Christmas hit they both desperately need.

programme.title: Drop Dead Fred
programme.desc: An unhappy housewife (Phoebe Cates) gets a lift from the return of her imaginary childhood friend, Drop Dead Fred (Rik Mayall).

programme.title: Mercy Christmas
programme.desc: When Michael Briskett meets the perfect woman, his ideal Christmas dream comes true when she invites him to her family's holiday celebration. Dreams shattered, Michael struggles to survive once he realizes HE will be Christmas dinner.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a popular cafe must convince a celeb and his fiancé to reunite to save her reputation.

programme.title: Betting on the Bride
programme.desc: A womanizer bets that he can get someone to accept his marriage proposal after just 30 days of dating. What he doesn't know is that the woman he targets has serious commitment issues.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Locals and the media stand up to authorities when they shut down a girl's lemonade stand.

programme.title: The Wedding Contest
programme.desc: When a couple can't decide on a wedding theme, they hire two wedding planners to compete for the job.

programme.title: Christmas Tail
programme.desc: A heartwarming tale of friendship and love as single mom Maggie adopts a Labrador for her son Ethan.

programme.title: Manhole
programme.desc: Down the manhole, a breathtaking showdown unfolds between the two sisters and the serial killer.

programme.title: HITMAN: AGENT JUN
programme.desc: Jun, a former human weapon turned webtoon artist, must protect his peaceful family life amid a massive battle.

programme.title: Iris: New Generation
programme.desc: During peace talks, a North Korean diplomat is killed, sparking a hunt as NSS faces moles and terrorism.

programme.title: Fortune Salon
programme.desc: Tae-rang is a successful upscale clairvoyant with not only gifted shamanistic talent, but also good looks. Yet fate has it that she is destined to marry Seung-won, the most unattractive and lazy man she has ever met.

programme.title: Forever Single
programme.desc: Three brothers living together are in a wild adventure when Hercules has a crazy baby mama who gets her detective dad to force Hercules to take care of his responsibilities by any means necessary.

programme.title: Flew'd Out
programme.desc: Tiara is a social media influencer who goes viral after posting a video of a fallout between her and a man she was dating. In an attempt to keep up her social media momentum, Tiara accepts an invitation to be flown out to meet a man named Josiah.

programme.desc: After being set up to get jumped, West now owes the biggest Street hustler in Syracuse, Gunzo $50,000. When Gunzo's crew shows up at West's family home, his older siblings step in to protect the family from his wrath.

programme.title: Toxic Friendz
programme.desc: When an average, anti-social, woman gets tired of going through the motions of her daily life, she reluctantly decides to attend her company's Halloween Party. As the night goes along, debauchery ensues, revealing secrets and revelations about herself. Reality blurs, friendships shatter, but who's the real villain?

programme.desc: Two outlaws (James Garner, Dennis Weaver) stage a prison break to steal a fortune in gold dust guarded by the Army.

programme.desc: When a murder occurs during a range war, a sheriff (Buck Jones) investigates to clear an innocent man (John Wayne).

programme.desc: A Confederate plot to turn the Sioux against the Union crumbles when a double agent makes off with a shipment of gold.

programme.desc: An ex-convict (Phil Carey) and his girlfriend (Martha Hyer) cannot start over until they stop Butch Cassidy's (Gene Evans) gang.

programme.desc: The Gambler Brady Hawkes is back and he's about to lose his primary means of livelihood, when a law banning gambling is about to be passed.

programme.desc: The Gambler Brady Hawkes is back and he's about to lose his primary means of livelihood, when a law banning gambling is about to be passed.

programme.desc: A man (Robert Woods) seeks revenge against the bandit (Dean Stratford) who killed his younger brother during a massacre.

The pair's journey into the remote Red Rock region of Utah is a perilous one, which ultimately brings them face to face with Chief Cut Tongue (Henry Wilcoxon), whose solution to the situation is a treacherous one.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Frontier Marshal
programme.desc: In the frontier town of Tombstone, Arizona, the charismatic Wyatt Earp (Randolph Scott) is a pistol-toting sheriff who earns the respect of almost everyone he encounters. John "Doc" Halliday (Cesar Romero), however, poses an unusual challenge to the lawman when he flouts local rules with his illegal business ventures. But the sheriff finds himself acting on Halliday's behalf when the latter is slain, leading to the famed gun battle at the O.K. Corral.

programme.title: The Outlaw Josey Wales
programme.desc: Josey Wales (Clint Eastwood) watches helplessly as his wife and child are murdered, by Union men led by Capt. Terrill (Bill McKinney). Seeking revenge, Wales joins the Confederate Army. He refuses to surrender when the war ends, but his fellow soldiers go to hand over their weapons -- and are massacred by Terrill. Wales guns down some of Terrill's men and flees to Texas, where he tries to make a new life for himself, but the bounty on his head endangers him and his new surrogate family.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Widow Lucy Tutaine is outraged by the indifference to her financial loss when her cow is hit by a train and she decides to sue the railroad.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Corbin, a cowboy, explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.

programme.desc: Jonathan faces his toughest challenge yet as he enters a country that has been coming to grips in defining and understanding their own cuisine. Through the historical turmoil and harsh climate, Russia has lost it's traditional way of cooking, and eating. But the country is reviving this culture Jonathan ventures the far stretches of the country to learn about modern cooks, as well as ancient kitchens housing the one key tool that gave birth to true Russian cuisine, the Russian oven. He'll learn their insights, understand their efforts, and work with traditional Russian ingredients to learn what the cuisine used to be, and where it's headed today.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The pink city hosts a coffer full of world-famous food treasures. The Victor Hugo Market has black truffles of Quercy, Rocamadour cheese, foie gras, and white beans of the most traditional Cassoulet on sale. And Michelin-starred chef Michel Sarràn gives us his tips on what the belly of Toulouse really is.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The old ladies selling their baskets full of vegetables and cheese on the Dolac market in Zagreb bring us back in time. At the market, we go from the breathtaking Mediterranean islands to the Austrian Alps, from freshly caught hake and simple Baltic snacks to internationally awarded cheese and a unique Turkey breed.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Food markets have a strong tradition in the Netherlands and many citizens count on their long street markets for their fresh food supplies. One of the oldest and most famous markets of the Netherlands is the Albert Cuyp Markt, a street market stretching along the upcoming (and "hip") neighborhood of de Pijp.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Arriving by boat to the Baltic Sea Harbor of Helsinki, it is the first building you see. Behind it, the square and the great dome of the city hall. The Old Market Hall (Wanha VanhaKauppahall) is a beautiful little 19th-century brick building with hi-varnish wooden stalls.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: "Mercado da Ribeira", in the Santos Area nearby Cais do Sodré train station, has been open since the 1800s and is the city's oldest marketplace. Here you can find all sorts of dairy products, fresh fish, vegetables, and fruits. It was refurbished in 2014 and it is now possible to eat gourmet signature meals there from the most quintessential chefs in Portugal.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Viktualienmarkt developed from an original farmers' market to a popular market for gourmets. The market also hosts a number of traditional and folkloric events. But the center of the social life of the city is the world-famous Biergarten - here the seven historical breweries of the city pour the finest beers of the world.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Placed in the middle of Palermo's ancient streets, it is almost difficult to walk. All around there is a swarm of colors and perfumes. There is everything the Mediterranean island, so rich in agricultural traditions, has to offer. Street food here is a must, including dozens of roasted, salted, pickled, and fried specialties one can count on.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati tours one of Hermosillo's oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery. In her kitchen, Pati shares her take on a classic Sonoran recipe - a carne con chile burrito.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he'll love - beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora's coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes- a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: As Pati travels with her TV production crew through Mexico, they stop at a hacienda outside of Hermosillo where Pati prepares a true Sonoran feast in the rustic outdoor kitchen - Sonora cheese soup, chicken in pecan and ancho chile sauce.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes traditional tamales with corn, chiles, and cheese, and then for the main course, pork chops topped with a pickled grape salad. In Sonora, she visits a traditional hacienda, where she gets a true taste of Sonoran ranch food.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Crispy Pork Noodles and Cheesy Chard Cannelloni
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Spring Onion Chicken Curry and Sausage Broccoli Pizza
programme.desc: Jamie elevates asparagus spears for a fishy feat, makes spring onions the star of the show in his spicy green chicken curry and gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Buddy's Strawberry Rice Pudding and Summer Tomato Chicken Bake
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a chicken sheet pan dinner with early tomatoes, potatoes and chorizo. Buddy helps pick strawberries for quick jam rice pudding. The summer feast ends with spicy shrimp skewers with homegrown chillies and a refreshing cucumber gazpacho.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Bob Stromberg
programme.desc: After forty years performing a blend of stand-up, story, and shtick, Bob Stromberg brings his style to the trials of aging.

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: BT
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Don Barnhart
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: David Dyer
programme.desc: David Dyer has been performing at stand-up at comedy clubs and corporate events for over twenty years. He's worked with some of the best comics in the industry including Mike Birbiglia, Jim Breuer, and Lewis Black. He's been a contributing writer to NBC's Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and ABC's Politically Incorrect. He's a regular on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Show and often appears on the roster for their “Friends of The Bob and Tom Show” comedy tour. He's the host of a new web series called Sidecar Sessions where he interviews guests who are sitting in the sidecar of his motorcycle as David pilots the bike around town. David also created and stars in another web series called Pillars with co-star, Kevin Yon. David became an on-call firefighter with Grand Rapids Township in Michigan….his wife is nervous.

programme.title: Greg Warren
programme.desc: Greg Warren is a nationally touring headliner and has been featured on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central Presents, The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson, BET and CMT. Greg is a fan favorite on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Radio Show and can be heard daily on Sirius/XM.

programme.title: Jim Colliton
programme.desc: Fueling his comedy with stories from his suburban life, Jim Colliton jokes about shredding children's art work, cats with depression, and wanting to fly separate from his wife.

programme.title: John Branyan
programme.desc: John Branyan's comedy is smart and sarcastic in perfect proportions. This special features his perspective on why God made everyone stupid and his unparalleled Shakespearean take on The Three Little Pigs.

programme.title: Corey Rodrigues
programme.desc: Corey is a highly sought after national touring college, club and corporate and cruise ship performer. He was the winner of The Catch a New Rising Star, The Funniest Comic in New England and the 2017 Big Sky Comedy Festivals. Rodrigues has been featured on the hilarious Gotham Live, Laughs on Fox and True Tv's Laff Mobbs Laff Tracks television shows and currently can be heard on Sirius XM. He combines comedy from his own life and the lives of those around him. Mix that with a hilarious point of view and he's able to talk about just about anything.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.sub-title: Come on down!" "The Price Is Right
programme.desc: - hosted by Bob Barker until 2007 and Drew Carey thereafter -- features a wide variety of games and contests with the same basic challenge: Guess the prices of everyday (or not-quite-everyday) retail items. Four contestants, all of whom are seated in one of the wildest audiences in daytime game-show history, are called to the stage to play a preliminary pricing round. That winner joins the host on stage for one of more than 70 different pricing games. After three such games, the contestants spin a big wheel -- hoping to get as close to $1 as possible -- in the "Showcase Showdown." The two highest winners of that round advance to the final, where prizes could be cars or roomsful of furniture. A trio of models presents the prizes.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.desc: Four contestants -- one a returning champion, the other three chosen from the studio audience -- bid on items or groups of items in an auction-style format, hoping to be the one who comes closest to the actual retail price without going over.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
programme.desc: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Tip of the Ice Storm
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm
programme.desc: You better board up the windows and secure all the doors, because Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be, with some of the most electrifying, fiercest, and extreme weather videos you have ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
programme.desc: The countdown has begun as we prepare for some of the most extreme weather caught on camera! Everything from supercell thunderstorms, to mile-high tornados! We got you covered while you stay covered.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | What the Hail?
programme.desc: Brace yourself, because unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning displays, and glass shattering hail storms are all par for the course when Mother Nature puts us in our place here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | 1000 Lawn Chairs in the Wind
programme.desc: It doesn't matter that there are over a 1000 tornados or millions of thunderstorms take place all over the world every year someone is always going to be there to capture it and when they do, you know that we are going to show it to you!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | When It Rains It Pours
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown, the only place where lightning can strike, the earth can quake, and the streets can flood, all in the same half hour!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
programme.desc: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Rain or High Water
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back outside, we've go a brand new episode to change your mind! Brace yourselves, because we're about to head into frenzy once again! From twisty tornados to scary storms, we've got them all.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice
programme.desc: Mother Nature isn't messing around and she's back with even more of the craziest weather clips assembled. From the shores of Florida, to the outback of Australia, we've traveled the world to collect these videos, and each one is designed to blow you away.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
programme.desc: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen!

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

So how do you track these missing monsters down and bring them back to their new home at Monster High? You call The Ghoul Squad!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Let's Explore: Swordfish, Lobsters, Beluga Whales, and Flamingos
programme.desc: Join the Ocean Explorers crew and learn about swordfish, lobsters, beluga whales, and flamingos! Enjoy real-life footage of these majestic creatures. Discover sorting, the concepts of pairs, imitation, and opposites . Sing and dance along to The Ring Toss Song, Where Is The Pair?, Beluga Simon Says, and The Stand on One Leg Song.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Space and Sky
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Let's Explore: Polar Bears, Sea Lions, Whistling Swans and Narwhals
programme.desc: Join the Ocean Explorers crew and learn about polar bears, sea lions, whistling swans, and narwhals! Enjoy real-life footage of these majestic creatures. Discover how to count, learn about your five senses, and see the difference between large and small through narration and repetition. Sing and dance along to Polar Bear Hide n Seek, The Sea Lion Bark, and Let's Build a Nest Together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Animals in the Water
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: No Blueberry Is an Island
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does, so they can prepare accordingly—they see Strawberry wearing a diving mask and snorkel in the cafe, and race to the lake to practice scuba diving, not knowing she was only slicing onions.

programme.title: Where the Berry Breeze Blows
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here! She insists they can build a copy of “Berry Breezy Bay” resort on Berry Bitty Lake, a duplicate down to the last detail.

programme.title: I Want Cake!
programme.desc: Sid and his friends discover that only eating cake would make their bodies feel terrible. Then they explore and learn that the best way to stay healthy is by eating nutritious food.

programme.title: The Big Sneeze
programme.desc: Sid and his friends learn that germs are so small that you can't see them. And they discover that a great way to stay healthy and keep germs away is by washing their hands with soap and water!

programme.title: Tarzan and Jane
programme.desc: Baby Tarzan is rescued from a plane crash by the gorilla, Kala, and brought to a Shaman who treats Tarzan's injuries with a mix of native medicines and experimental science - saving Tarzan's life and giving him supernatural animal powers in the process. Tarzan is returned to Kala and remains in the jungle, defending animals from poachers, hunters and other threats. As a teenager, Tarzan is discovered by an expedition team from London, paid for by his billionaire grandfather. It is during this expedition where Tarzan meets Jane, and they become fast friends. Later, a series of mishaps takes him to London, reuniting Tarzan not only with his long lost family, but Jane as well. It is here where Tarzan and Jane learn to navigate the “urban jungle” of London, and uncover a dastardly plot to steal and sell exotic animals to the highest bidder! It is up to our heroes to figure out who is behind this sinister deed, and return the animals to their rightful homes in the jungle.

programme.title: Blippi's Spooky Spell Halloween
programme.desc: With a guidebook of Spooky Halloween Spells, Blippi investigates costumes, treats, and the art of pumpkin carving.

programme.title: The Berry Best Vacation
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top “Entertainment Tonight”-style show host/producer from Episode 206. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation. Trying to accommodate Mavis and continue their vacation doesn't work—every time the girls try to have fun together, Mavis pops up, poking a microphone in Cherry's face, insisting on treating her as if she were a Lady Gaga-type.

programme.title: The Berry Long Winter
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City—a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play “Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose.” The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing. But it turns out the Berrykins' version of the game has different rules: they zoom around on little hang gliders made of leaves!

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Yusaku Fuiki, has become a celebrity in the aftermath of battling Hanoi. He continues to investigate the mysterious program he dubs "Ai." Meanwhile, SOL Technologies begins to look deeper into the identity of Playmaker.

programme.title: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: Go Onizuka, a popular duelist on Link VRAINS, accepts an offer from SOL to duel Playmaker. He wants to prove himself and he sees Playmaker as a powerful opponent. He lures Yusaku into a trap and a Speed Duel begins.

programme.title: Blippi's School Supply Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Blippi embarks on a fantastic back-to-school adventure!

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors—the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. “We don't know when the next mail will get through!” It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting! She gets a brainstorm. Cutting up the side of an old broken tennis racket, she attaches the pieces to her rain boots—instant ice skates! Fashionably bundled against the cold, and pulled by butterflies who sail on the wind like kites, she sail-skates down the frozen road, to the amazement of her friends.

programme.title: On Ice
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain—the Berrykins are still working out the bugs. Strawberry reminds them that this is a public area that should be shared, and suggests they work out a schedule.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Bad Hair Day // Ice is Nice
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. programme.title: Super Car
programme.desc: The Super Car Series is a brand-new children's musical animation short film created by the BarryTiger brand, designed to introduce kids to different vehicles. Tailored for preschool children aged 0-8, the series uses an original musical format, allowing kids to learn about various common cars and machinery through engaging songs. Beyond vehicle recognition, it also fosters values of respect, kindness, and teamwork. The story takes place in a town where humans and cars coexist, with fourteen Super Cars working together to protect the city, resolve everyday challenges, and combat disasters caused by villains.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they've found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong. But Twist harbors a dark secret that could doom the mission - and the Shane Gang.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli fires slugs right and left during a fast-paced slugout on mecha-back! "See you back home," Eli tells the slugs he has to leave behind as he races across a cavern during the fight. The battle won, the Shane Gang is on its way back home when Eli runs into a situation that he can't ignore. One thing leads to another and Eli ends up challenged to a duel. Only one problem, Eli's doesn't have Burpy or the rest of his best slugs! They're still on the way back home!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli has added some awesome new slugs to his arsenal: the Elementals. But the Elemental Slugs are ancient, extremely powerful, and temperamental, and Eli can't control them. Junjie, the newest member of the Shane Gang, has the solution: Eli must learn Slug Fu, the ancient form of slugslinging that Junjie mastered in the Eastern Caverns. Slug Fu is the art of guiding and controlling a slug in battle, a skill that only the greatest slugslingers can master.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. programme.title: Slugterra

Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra

It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reaccionan como locos ante un sismo y solicitan un curso de evacuación a la delegación, ya que quieren estar preparados ante un evento así, lo que no se imaginan es que otro sismo está próximo y los pondrá a prueba.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Morris está en la etapa de las dudas y pregunta a sus padres cómo conquistar al amor de su vida Alejandra y Rocko deciden contarle una historia de amor, el relato de cómo se conocieron.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Excelsa está embarazada, Ludovico y Federica quieren saber quién es el padre. Ludovico y Federica hacen un casting para ver quién podría ser el padre del hijo de Excelsa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica tiene un enamorado secreto. Carmelita Salinas entrevista a Federica y Ludovico Peluche. Federico niega que el hijo de Excelsa sea de él.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica hace planes para comer con sus papás pero Ludovico muere por ver el fútbol, así que arma una estrategia para regresar temprano a casa. En casa de sus suegros, Ludovico se las ingenia para estar enterado de cómo va el partido.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma aconseja a Mía esperar para tener relaciones sexuales. Por su parte, Roberta le dice a Alma que rompió con Joaquín y que está embarazada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Joaquín busca a Roberta para que regresen. Mía se entera que Miguel le invento a Joaquín que su papá es Narco. Finalmente, Roberta no acepta tener relaciones con Joaquín.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le dice a Joaquín la verdad sobre Franco. Además, León amenaza a Mabel con dejarla en la calle y quitarle a Diego. Por su parte, Roberta se enoja con Enrique por querer andar con Alma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta golpea a Vico por inventar que anda con Teo.Por su parte, Joaquín le cuenta a Roberta sobre la muerte del hermano de Teo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mabel le pide a Diego quedarse con su papá, porque no quiere que lo lastime. Por su parte, Roberta le aclara a Teo que él no es culpable de la muerte de su hermano. Diego le dice a Roberta que Joaquín la engaña con Mía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Teo quiere saber si es verdad que su hermano estaba drogado cuando se accidentó, pero sus padres lo niegan Roberta le dice a Mia que Joaquín anda con las dos y, al vengarse de él, le provoca un accidente todos creen que Nico es dueño de un café.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma logra que Roberta le cuente sobre su decepción amorosa con Joaquín Franco encuentra a Mia cantando en un café y la castiga Celina le dice a Mia que Vico salió con Miguel y que tuvieron relaciones Joaquín llega en muletas al colegio.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Gaviota decide creer que Rodrigo regresará para casarse con ella, pero poco a poco comienza a decepcionarse al no tener noticias de él y no poderle decir que espera un hijo. Gaviota acepta modelar para poder viajar a París.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Gaviota viaja a París creyendo que será modelo, pero en realidad es una casa de citas. Gaviota logra escapar y vaga por las calles de París, hasta que un hombre decide apiadarse de ella.

programme.title: Vivir de amor: La nueva esposa
programme.desc: Angelli enfrenta la realidad de que José Emilio y Rebeca se casarán. Rebeca ejecuta su plan para impedir que su madre le revele la verdad a José Emilio.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Espanto trata de secuestrar a Liliana, pero la hiere y la deja al borde de la muerte. El único que puede salvar la vida de Liliana es Vicente, su verdadero padre.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Vicente le cuenta a Adriana todo lo que le hizo Aníbal en el pasado. Victoria promete alejarse de Arriaga si Liliana sobrevive.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.sub-title: La verdad antes de la muerte
programme.desc: Ante la posible muerte de Liliana, Candelaria le dice a Adriana que Lili es su hija. Nikki acepta que Guzmán se case con Liliana.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Guzmán visita a Liliana en el hospital, le dice que cumplirá su sueño casarse con ella. Aníbal le asegura a Carlos que lo odia, éste sabe que nunca le perdonará que Victoria se haya enamorado de él. Aníbal le revela que Adriana está embarazada de él.

programme.title: El cuerpazo del delito

programme.title: Lío de faldas

programme.title: El peñón de las ánimas
programme.desc: Un ranchero y una dama refinada se enamoran, pero la enemistad entre sus familias amenaza su relación amorosa.

programme.title: El que tenga un amor

programme.title: Dos corazones y un cielo

programme.desc: Raimundo sufre el repudio de su familia por fechorías que no cometió. La única que cree en él es su madre, doña Lupita, una mujer que sufre profundamente a causa de las decisiones equivocadas de sus hijos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Marisela sufre una severa inestabilidad psicológica debido a la violencia de su padre, eso la lleva a violentar, chantajear y cometer estupro con Leonardo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De limpios y valentones están llenos los panteones
programme.desc: Un joven con mala conducta adquiere una pistola para vengarse del karateka que le quitó a su novia, pero su mamá buscará la manera de disciplinarlo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven expone constantemente su integridad al cumplir retos por internet y esto lo lleva a descubrir que es adoptado. El joven decide buscar a su madre biológica y descubre una vida totalmente diferente en un pueblo lejano.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Ábranse piojos, que ahí les va el peine
programme.desc: Un joven y su hermano sufren un terrible accidente que deja a uno de ellos sin la posibilidad de caminar, ambos comienzan a distanciarse y solo la verdadera amistad y el amor lograrán que vuelvan a tener una buena relación.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El marrano más trompudo agarra la mejor mazorca
programme.desc: Un joven decide viajar a un pueblo para conquistar a una mujer y quedarse con su rancho, pero al conocerla todo cambia y le propone un gran negocio para salvar ese hermoso lugar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Lo que se consigue en la niñez, crece y agrada después
programme.desc: Un niño se vuelve agresivo y comienza a ser grosero con su padre y su nueva familia, pero la actitud de su madrastra podría ayudarlo a sanar sus emociones y unir a su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.desc: Cecilia y Roger tienen algún tiempo que se gustan, pero no se atreven a confesarlo. En una fiesta donde ingieren alcohol, ella se queda a dormir con su amiga Tania y Roger le roba un beso, pero Tania lo acusa de abusador.
